
# use git-bash or WSL with OpenSSL installed
$ cd /c/Users/Yob/Documents/Coding/PoC\ 9/go-didx509-toolkit/test_ca
$ openssl version
$ ./issue-cert.sh mach2.disyepd.com "ZBC Demo Kliniek" "Locality" 00000000000 00000000 00700700


## copy the certs from 
.\go-didx509-toolkit\test_ca
to
.\local-dev\certs


## create x.509 credential which must be added to the DID
$ cd ./nuts-node/local-dev/
$ docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/certs:/certs" nutsfoundation/go-didx509-toolkit:1.1.0 vc /certs/mach2.disyepd.com-chain.pem /certs/mach2.disyepd.com.key "CN=Fake UZI Root CA" did:web:localhost%3A8083:iam:3f91f049-b385-4351-bba5-e192bd1b3ab6

output:
..1oPpdNbmR07nCN5C_KRggPZ8nYXSajZDUcofWlVKv7vwsphuIPkjz7KVNO6AlMnL653R4XfkVGGTLd-95YgLzQdB0dUfGS_nlQZMXWqe2X-6N80F2WHBZzdCEvt9YwaWxSZHSjxLGqrEky5eZFg2kI1N_NPgoshUDcCs2Jy2rZGMGGAeIWHcymQzeUqfzYpB_U0hYnXjzGV57SCCPTL1ZVHBP141WNfT7zvV4bH-6pg4SsYgPHgcqISaf1oNBIBtjRQZtUal5XVJmLCPKDDRTmyNNN5jKCUusySd2aacVofIH-8Naqbxbw1TRcbDuqkry7ZSKb7xqBOnPiGHf3ZV8Q
